name: PrivateBin
description: A minimalist, open source online pastebin
compose:
name: slashnode-privatebin
services:
  server:
    image: privatebin/nginx-fpm-alpine:2.0.4
    container_name: privatebin
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - server_data-privatebin-data:/srv/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3070:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-privatebin-data:
    name: slashnode-privatebin_server_data-privatebin-data
